concerns.text: Task ID T026 in tasks.md (Unit tests for validator) conflicts with spec.md T026 (Synthetic Validation Dataset Generation). This breaks traceability; implementers cannot verify if spec T026 is covered.
Task ID T062 in tasks.md (Integration test for export consistency) conflicts with spec.md T062 (Monte Carlo Validation). Traceability to FR-026 is obscured by ID mismatch.
T069 creates real-world validation set but omits the required stratification across five major domains (tech, e-commerce, finance, healthcare, SaaS) mandated by FR-031b and SC-031b.
T044 implements bias-adjustment but lacks the explicit subsampling action required by FR-027 when a domain exceeds 30% of the corpus.
T016 computes checksums only for raw dataset files. Constitution Principle III requires checksums for ALL files under data/ (including processed and output).
File path inconsistency: T069 creates data/manual_validation/real_world_labels.csv while T072 references data/manual_validation/annotated_summaries.csv for the same validation set.
